base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dee_jay — a character from 1991 street fighter ii. Dee Jay — Super SF2 Jamaican kickboxer. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dee Jay — Super SF2 Jamaican kickboxer; Air Slasher + Machine Gun Upper
